ocr_findings.description: Image presents two side-by-side columns of index entries (は行 left, ま行/や行 right). Cleaned MD renders all entries sequentially as a single markdown table (term | page number), losing the two-column spatial layout. Content is fully preserved; format differs cosmetically.

reviewer_notes: Back-of-book index page covering は行, ま行, and や行・ら行・わ行 entries. All terms and page numbers spot-checked (プロジェクトコミュニケーションマネジメント 254,262; ブロックチェーン 531; ランサムウェア 494) correctly reproduced. Single low-severity layout difference: two-column image rendered as sequential markdown table.
